logger.message: #["[RETRY] Order: " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown") ++ " | Attempt: " ++ (vars.retryCount default 0 as String) ++ " | Service: " ++ (vars.failedService default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Retry Attempt

logger.message: #["[DLQ] Max retries exceeded for order: " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log DLQ Routing

amqp:message.amqp:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "unknown", orderId: vars.orderId default "unknown", customerId: vars.customerId default "unknown", customerTier: vars.customerTier default "STANDARD", sku: vars.orderSku default "unknown", quantity: vars.orderQuantity default 0, orderValue: vars.orderValue default 0, originalPayload: vars.originalPayload default {}, failedService: vars.failedService default "unknown", retryCount: vars.retryCount default 0, lastError: vars.lastError default "unknown", failedAt: now() as String, `type`: "DEAD_LETTER" }]

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, timestamp: now() as String, correlationId: vars.correlationId default "unknown", status: "DEAD_LETTERED", message: "Order could not be processed after maximum retry attempts. Archived for manual review.", retryCount: vars.retryCount default 0, failedService: vars.failedService default "unknown" }]
set-payload.doc:name: Dead Letter Response

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var attempt = vars.retryCount default 1 var initial = 1000 var maxDelay = 8000 var calculated = initial * (2 pow (attempt as Number)) --- if (calculated > maxDelay) maxDelay else calculated as Number]
set-variable.doc:name: Calculate Backoff Delay

logger.message: #["[RETRY] Backing off for " ++ (vars.backoffDelay default 1000 as String) ++ "ms | Retry attempt: " ++ (vars.retryCount default 1 as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Backoff

amqp:message.amqp:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId: vars.correlationId default "unknown", orderId: vars.orderId default "unknown", customerId: vars.customerId default "unknown", customerTier: vars.customerTier default "STANDARD", sku: vars.orderSku default "unknown", quantity: vars.orderQuantity default 0, orderType: vars.orderType default "STANDARD", orderValue: vars.orderValue default 0, priority: vars.processingPriority default "STANDARD", routingPath: vars.routingPath default "STANDARD_LANE", erpReservationId: vars.erpReservationId default null, originalPayload: vars.originalPayload default {}, retryCount: vars.retryCount default 1, failedService: vars.failedService default "unknown", backoffDelay: vars.backoffDelay default 1000, retryAfter: now() as String, `type`: "RETRY" }]

logger.message: #["[RETRY] Order " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown") ++ " queued for retry attempt " ++ (vars.retryCount default 1 as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Retry Queued

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (payload is String) read(payload, 'application/json') else payload]
set-variable.doc:name: Parse Retry Message

logger.message: #["[RETRY CONSUMER] Processing retry | OrderId: " ++ vars.orderId ++ " | Attempt: " ++ (vars.retryCount as String) ++ "/" ++ "3" ++ " | Failed service: " ++ vars.failedService]
logger.doc:name: Log Retry Pickup

logger.message: #["[RETRY CONSUMER] Error in retry consumer | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log Error

logger.message: #["[CIRCUIT BREAKER] Circuit OPEN for service: " ++ (vars.targetService default "unknown") ++ " — request blocked"]
logger.doc:name: Log Circuit Open

raise-error.description: #['Circuit breaker is open for service: ' ++ (vars.targetService default 'unknown')]
raise-error.doc:name: Raise Circuit Open Error

logger.message: #["[CIRCUIT BREAKER] Circuit CLOSED for: " ++ (vars.targetService default "unknown") ++ " — proceeding"]
logger.doc:name: Log Circuit Closed

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java var newCount = vars.currentCount default 1 var threshold = 3 --- { count: newCount, lastFailure: now() as String, state: if (newCount >= threshold) 'OPEN' else 'CLOSED', openedAt: if (newCount >= threshold) (now() as String) else null }]
set-variable.doc:name: Calculate New Circuit State

logger.message: #["[CIRCUIT BREAKER] Circuit OPENED for: " ++ (vars.targetService default "unknown") ++ " after " ++ (vars.currentCount default 0 as String) ++ " failures"]
logger.doc:name: Log Circuit Opened

logger.message: #["[CIRCUIT BREAKER] Failure " ++ (vars.currentCount default 0 as String) ++ "/3 for: " ++ (vars.targetService default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Failure Count

os:store.doc:name: Reset Circuit State
os:store.os:value: #[{ count: 0, lastFailure: null, state: "CLOSED", resetAt: now() as String }]

logger.message: #["[CIRCUIT BREAKER] Circuit RESET for: " ++ (vars.targetService default "unknown") ++ " — back to CLOSED"]
logger.doc:name: Log Circuit Reset

logger.message: #["[SAGA] Initiating rollback for order: " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown") ++ " | Failed step: " ++ (vars.failedStep default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Saga Rollback Start

http:request.doc:name: Release ERP Inventory
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId default "unknown", sku: vars.orderSku default "unknown", quantity: vars.orderQuantity default 0, reservationId: vars.erpReservationId default "unknown" }]

logger.message: #["[SAGA] ERP inventory released for order: " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log ERP Rollback Success

logger.message: #['[SAGA] ERP step not completed — no rollback needed']
logger.doc:name: Log No ERP Rollback

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, timestamp: now() as String, correlationId: vars.correlationId default "unknown", status: "ROLLED_BACK", message: "Order processing failed and all completed steps have been compensated.", failedStep: vars.failedStep default "unknown" }]
set-payload.doc:name: Saga Rollback Response

http:request.doc:name: Track Event
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId default "unknown", customerId: vars.customerId default "unknown", customerTier: vars.customerTier default "STANDARD", sku: vars.orderSku default "unknown", quantity: vars.orderQuantity default 0, orderValue: vars.orderValue default 0, eventType: vars.analyticsEventType default "ORDER_EVENT", channel: "MULESOFT_INTEGRATION" }]

logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS] Tracking failed for order: " ++ (vars.correlationId default "unknown") ++ " — continuing"]
logger.doc:name: Log Analytics Failure
